get.summary: Open WebUI Prompts 分页列表
get.description: GET JSON：与下游分页搜索语义一致；可选查询参数 ``query``、``view_option``、``tag``、``order_by``、``direction``、``page``（≥1）。需 ``openwebui`` 映射；否则 404。
GET JSON：单条 prompt（含 ``write_access`` 等字段）。路径参数 ``command`` 为下游存储的 command 字符串（将正确 URL 编码后转发）。

get.summary: Open WebUI Prompts 可读全量列表
get.description: GET JSON：当前用户在下游可见的 prompts 数组（形状与 Open Web UI 一致）。需 ``openwebui`` 映射；否则 404。

get.summary: Open WebUI Prompt 详情（按 id）
get.description: GET JSON：单条 prompt。无读权限或不存在时 404。

patch.description: 请求体为 Open Web UI ``PromptForm`` 形状 JSON（如 ``command``、``name``、``content`` 等）；平台使用 PATCH，下游为 POST update。无写权限时下游 401/403，本平台映射为 404/403。

delete.description: 成功时 **204** 无正文；无权限或不存在时 404/403。

schema.title: Response Me Ai Workbench Openwebui Tools List
Response Me Ai Workbench Openwebui Tool Get
Response Me Ai Workbench Openwebui Tool Valves Get
Response Me Ai Workbench Openwebui Tool Valves Patch

get.summary: 当前 Open Web UI 会话用户（工作台）
get.description: 只读：返回当前登录用户在 Open Web UI 侧对应绑定用户（acting uid）的会话用户信息。需存在 ``user_app_mappings`` 中 ``app_name=openwebui`` 的映射；否则 404。

get.summary: Open Web UI 文件夹列表
get.description: 当前用户在 Open Web UI 侧的文件夹摘要列表（JSON 数组）。需存在 ``openwebui`` 映射；否则 404。

schema.title: Response Me Ai Workbench Openwebui Folders List

post.summary: 创建 Open Web UI 文件夹
post.description: 请求体 JSON：`name` 必填，可选 `data`、`meta`、`parent_id`。需存在 ``openwebui`` 映射；否则 404。

schema.title: Response Me Ai Workbench Openwebui Folders Create

get.summary: 获取单个 Open Web UI 文件夹
get.description: JSON 对象，形状与下游文件夹模型一致。需存在 ``openwebui`` 映射；否则 404；无权限或不存在时 404。

schema.title: Response Me Ai Workbench Openwebui Folder Get

patch.summary: 更新 Open Web UI 文件夹
patch.description: 请求体 JSON：可选 `name`、`data`、`meta`（至少提供一项）。需存在 ``openwebui`` 映射；否则 404。

schema.title: Response Me Ai Workbench Openwebui Folder Patch

delete.summary: 删除 Open Web UI 文件夹
delete.description: 可选查询参数 ``delete_contents``（默认 ``true``），语义与 Open Web UI 一致。需存在 ``openwebui`` 映射；否则 404。

get.description: 只读：转发 Open Web UI 的 ``GET /api/v1/configs/{config_key}``，**仅允许白名单** ``['banners']``。**不会**代理 ``connections``、``export``/``import``、``tool_servers``、``terminal_servers``、``code_execution``、``models`` 等含连接信息或密钥的配置；未列入白名单的 ``config_key`` 返回 **404**。需存在 ``user_app_mappings`` 中 ``app_name=openwebui`` 的映射；否则 404。

get.summary: Open Web UI Notes 列表（只读）
get.description: GET JSON：当前 acting 用户在下游可读的笔记列表（形状与 Open Web UI fork 的 Notes 列表接口一致，含分页项等）。可选查询参数 ``page``（≥1）与下游语义一致。需存在 ``user_app_mappings`` 中 ``app_name=openwebui`` 的映射；否则 404。

get.summary: Open Web UI Note 详情（只读）
get.description: GET JSON：单条笔记详情（含 ``write_access`` 等字段，与下游一致）。映射与错误语义同列表接口。

get.summary: Open Web UI Skills 列表（只读）
get.description: GET JSON：下游 Skills 列表（形状与 Open Web UI 一致）。需存在 ``openwebui`` 映射；否则 404。若部署未启用 Skills 路由，下游可能 404，本平台透传为 404。

get.summary: Open Web UI Skill 详情（只读）
get.description: GET JSON：单条 Skill。映射与错误语义同列表接口。

get.summary: Open Web UI Functions 列表（只读）
get.description: GET JSON：下游 Functions 列表。需存在 ``openwebui`` 映射；否则 404。若部署未暴露 Functions 模块，下游可能 404。

get.summary: Open Web UI Function 详情（只读）
get.description: GET JSON：单条 Function。映射与错误语义同列表接口。

post.summary: Open Web UI chat/completions（流式或非流式）
post.description: OpenAI 兼容 JSON：``stream: true`` 时透传下游 **SSE/分块** 响应（``text/event-stream`` 等，以实际下游为准）；否则返回单次 JSON completion。与 ``POST /me/ai/chats/{id}/messages`` 不同：后者在平台侧合并 Open Web UI chat JSON，本接口**不修改**会话树，仅为直连下游补全。需存在 ``openwebui`` 映射；否则 404。

AiChatCreateRequest.title: AiChatCreateRequest
AiChatCreateRequest.description:
Create an empty AI chat, or with ``body`` to create and run the first turn.

``model`` overrides ``MID_AUTH_OPENWEBUI_DEFAULT_MODEL_ID`` for this request.

id.title: Id
id.description: v1: OpenWebUI chat id (string), not a separate platform id.

id.title: Id
id.description: OpenWebUI message id (string) in this version, not a separate platform message id.

AiMessageOut.title: AiMessageOut
AiMessageOut.description: Minimal assistant/user line for API consumers.

ChangeGroupTypeRequest.title: ChangeGroupTypeRequest
ChangeGroupTypeRequest.description: Public ↔ private group type change (VoceChat ``members`` when converting to private).

message_id.title: Message Id
message_id.description: VoceChat message id returned by the downstream operation.

ChatMessageOperationResponse.title: ChatMessageOperationResponse
ChatMessageOperationResponse.description: VoceChat returns an int64 ``mid`` for edit / like / delete / reply; exposed as string.

ChatSessionInvalidateRequest.title: ChatSessionInvalidateRequest
ChatSessionInvalidateRequest.description:
Optional JSON body for ``POST /me/im/session/invalidate`` (v1: no fields).

Downstream: VoceChat ``POST /user/logout``. Invalidates the acting-uid device /
session used for chat APIs and SSE, not the platform login cookie.

ContactInfoOut.title: ContactInfoOut
ContactInfoOut.description: Mirrors VoceChat ``contact_info`` (plus optional ``remark`` when server supports it).

id.title: Id
id.description: v1: equals the peer's VoceChat user id (string). Not a platform-owned conversation id.

peer_display_name.title: Peer Display Name
peer_display_name.description: Display label from the platform ``users`` row for the peer (when mapped); otherwise null. Not sourced from VoceChat contact names.

ConversationOut.title: ConversationOut
ConversationOut.description:
One row in ``GET /me/conversations``.

**v1 source:** VoceChat ``GET /user/contacts``. This is an approximation of
“who I can DM / my contact graph”, **not** a strict “all historical inbox
threads” index. Threads may exist that are not listed here, and listed rows
may not imply recent message activity.

mid_list.title: Mid List
mid_list.description: VoceChat message ids (``mid``) to include in the archive.

message_id.title: Message Id
message_id.description: VoceChat message id to pin or unpin.

GroupPinMessageRequest.title: GroupPinMessageRequest
GroupPinMessageRequest.description: Pin or unpin a group message (VoceChat ``mid`` in the request body).

token.title: Token
token.description: Short-lived token string for the realtime SDK (e.g. Agora RTC).

app_id.title: App Id
app_id.description: Vendor app identifier for the realtime SDK.

client_uid.title: Client Uid
client_uid.description: Numeric user id to pass to the realtime SDK for this session.

channel_name.title: Channel Name
channel_name.description: Channel id/name for the group call.

expires_in_seconds.title: Expires In Seconds
expires_in_seconds.description: Time until the token becomes invalid, in seconds.

GroupRealtimeTokenResponse.title: GroupRealtimeTokenResponse
GroupRealtimeTokenResponse.description: Credentials to join the group realtime (RTC) channel.

last_message_id.title: Last Message Id
last_message_id.description: Latest VoceChat message id the user has read in this thread. There is no platform GET for this cursor; it is stored in VoceChat only.

LastMessageReadRequest.title: LastMessageReadRequest
LastMessageReadRequest.description: Advance the caller's read cursor for a DM or group (VoceChat ``mid``).

score.title: Score
score.description: Similarity-related score from vector search when present.

limit.title: Limit
limit.description: Max hits (maps downstream). Default left to upstream when omitted.

MemosInstanceSettingOut.title: MemosInstanceSettingOut
MemosInstanceSettingOut.description: Instance setting resource returned by Memos; extra keys dropped for stability.

MessageArchivePathOut.title: MessageArchivePathOut
MessageArchivePathOut.description: Opaque VoceChat archive path returned after create-archive.

size.title: Size
size.description: Byte length of the uploaded object.

MessageAttachmentOut.title: MessageAttachmentOut
MessageAttachmentOut.description: File metadata for a DM attachment (no storage path or VoceChat download URL).

action.title: Action
action.description: Opaque string forwarded to VoceChat (e.g. like / unlike semantics).

body.title: Body
body.description: Plain text for ``kind=text``. For ``kind=file``, often the original filename when known, otherwise empty.

sender_id.title: Sender Id
sender_id.description: VoceChat uid of the sender as decimal string.

kind.title: Kind
kind.description: ``file`` when the message is a VoceChat file attachment.

attachment.description: Present when ``kind=file`` (and in history when VoceChat exposes file properties).

remove_users.title: Remove Users
remove_users.description: VoceChat ``remove_users`` as peer public_ids (not raw uids).

remove_groups.title: Remove Groups
remove_groups.description: VoceChat ``remove_groups`` as platform group_id strings (not raw gids).

MuteRequest.title: MuteRequest
MuteRequest.description: Aligns with VoceChat ``MuteRequest``; user/group removals use platform IDs.

id.title: Id
id.description: Open WebUI user id for the mapped acting user.

OpenWebUISessionUserOut.title: OpenWebUISessionUserOut
OpenWebUISessionUserOut.description: Read-only view of the current user's Open WebUI session payload.

conversation_id.title: Conversation Id
conversation_id.description: v1: peer VoceChat user id as decimal string (same as ``ConversationOut.id`` and as the path parameter ``conversation_id`` on ``/me/conversations/{conversation_id}/…``). Not a platform-owned conversation or thread id.

target_public_id.title: Target Public Id
target_public_id.description: Peer platform ``users.public_id``; resolved to VoceChat uid.

PinUnpinChatRequest.title: PinUnpinChatRequest
PinUnpinChatRequest.description: Pin or unpin a 1:1 chat: set exactly one identifier (maps to VoceChat ``target.uid``).

PostCreateRequest.title: PostCreateRequest
PostCreateRequest.description: Body only. Server creates Memos content as PRIVATE; empty-after-strip → 400 in service.

PostListResponse.title: PostListResponse
PostListResponse.description: Paginated **current user** posts, not a public timeline.

id.title: Id
id.description: Memos memo UID in this version, not a separate platform post id.

creator_public_id.title: Creator Public Id
creator_public_id.description: Platform user public_id resolved from Memos creator mapping when available.

visibility.title: Visibility
visibility.description: Memos visibility (read-only for clients in v1; create is always private).

total_size.title: Total Size
total_size.description: Total count when Memos returns totalSize.

id.title: Id
id.description: Opaque reaction id (Memos reactions/* tail segment only).

reaction_type.title: Reaction Type
reaction_type.description: Emoji or reaction key from Memos.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Creation time when provided by Memos.

creator_public_id.title: Creator Public Id
creator_public_id.description: Platform public_id when the reactor maps to a platform user.

PostReactionOut.title: PostReactionOut
PostReactionOut.description: Memo reaction without exposing full Memos resource paths.

PostUpdateRequest.title: PostUpdateRequest
PostUpdateRequest.description: Body only; does not change visibility (v1).

token.title: Token
token.description: Push provider token for this device.

PushTokenUpdate.title: PushTokenUpdate
PushTokenUpdate.description: FCM (or compatible) push token for one device key.

SocialContactOut.title: SocialContactOut
SocialContactOut.description: Platform contact row: ``target_public_id`` replaces downstream uid in API surface.

StartDirectConversationRequest.title: StartDirectConversationRequest
StartDirectConversationRequest.description: module-09: first DM to a peer identified by platform ``public_id``.

StartDirectConversationResponse.title: StartDirectConversationResponse
StartDirectConversationResponse.description: VoceChat DM started; ``conversation.id`` is the peer VoceChat uid string.

UpdateBurnAfterReadingRequest.title: UpdateBurnAfterReadingRequest
UpdateBurnAfterReadingRequest.description: Maps to VoceChat ``UpdateBurnAfterReadingRequest`` after id resolution.

group_id.title: Group Id
group_id.description: VoceChat group id as decimal string (same as ``GET /me/groups``).

expires_in.title: Expires In
expires_in.description: TTL in seconds for messages in that group; ``0`` removes the setting.

expires_in.title: Expires In
expires_in.description: TTL in seconds for messages to that peer; ``0`` removes the setting.

display_name.title: Display Name
display_name.description: From mid-auth ``users.display_name`` / ``username`` when linked to VoceChat.

in_online.title: In Online
in_online.description: Reserved; always false for platform-only directory lookup.

UserDirectorySearchResult.title: UserDirectorySearchResult
UserDirectorySearchResult.description: Subset of profile fields; never includes VoceChat uid or credentials.

VirtmateGlobalConfigUpdateRequest.title: VirtmateGlobalConfigUpdateRequest
VirtmateGlobalConfigUpdateRequest.description: ASR / TTS settings used by VirtMate frontend.

VocechatAccountDeleteRequest.title: VocechatAccountDeleteRequest

tags.name: conversations
tags.description: 1:1 direct messages (VoceChat-backed). Path parameter ``conversation_id`` in v1 is the peer VoceChat user id (string), not a platform-owned conversation or thread id; it matches the ``id`` field on each row from GET /me/conversations.

tags.name: library
tags.description: Current user's Memos **account-level** API (stats, global attachments, shortcuts, settings, webhooks, notifications) under ``/me/library/*``. Memo **content** CRUD uses ``/me/posts*`` (separate from this surface).

tags.name: ai-chats
tags.description: Platform **primary chat** narrow API under ``/me/ai/chats*`` (list, title, messages, non-stream completion merged into Open WebUI chat JSON, delete). Does not include the Open WebUI workbench-wide BFF surface.

tags.name: ai-workbench
tags.description: Open WebUI **workbench-wide** BFF under ``/me/ai/workbench*`` (models, tools, prompts, memories, folders, ``chat/completions``, extra ``chats/*`` search/pin/archive/tags, etc.). Complements ``/me/ai/chats*``; it is not a duplicate of the narrow chat API.

tags.name: virtmate
tags.description: VirtMate frontend BFF under ``/me/virtmate*`` (session settings, runtime/global config, chat send + websocket events, ASR recognize, TTS playback, scene mouth-y). OpenWebUI user identity is derived from current mid-auth session mapping.
